Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.javapoet.LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder

Packages that use LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.javapoet
Opinionated extensions to JavaPoet to support Spring Data specific use cases.

  • Uses of LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder in org.springframework.data.javapoet

    Method
    Description

    Add a formatted statement to the builder.

    Add a CodeBlock to the statement builder.

    Concatenate elements into the builder with a delimiter.
    <T> LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder
    LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder.addAll(Iterable<? extends T> elements, Function<? super T, String> delim, Function<? super T, org.springframework.javapoet.CodeBlock> mapper)
    Concatenate elements into the builder with a custom delimiter function.

    LordOfTheStrings.StatementBuilder.ConditionalStatementStep.then(String format, @Nullable Object... args)
    Add a statement to the builder if the condition is met.
